description:
Convert start_link/1 to single-line do: syntax

Current (line 76-78):
```elixir
def start_link(opts) do
  GenServer.start_link(__MODULE__, opts, name: Keyword.get(opts, :name, __MODULE__))
end
```

Target:
```elixir
def start_link(opts), do: GenServer.start_link(__MODULE__, opts, name: Keyword.get(opts, :name, __MODULE__))
```

File: apps/bedrock_job_queue/lib/bedrock/job_queue/consumer/scanner.ex
title: Convert scanner.ex to do: syntax
